instances.prompt: A polished 4-second product intro for TrellisAI. Start from the provided green trellis leaf and sunrise field mark, then gently animate outward into bright farm rows at morning light. Subtle clean lines move from daily field notes into an organized work plan. User-facing hackathon demo tone, calm and practical, no readable text, no people, no animals, no robot face, no watermark.

parameters.negativePrompt: text, captions, letters, people, animals, robot face, watermark, blurry, low quality, stock footage look, cluttered UI
